body:
#### PR description:

Modify the testing scripts for the neighbour finder and implement debug in the original code

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Should be backported to 20_0_X
title: Phase2-hgx368G Modify the testing scripts for neighbour finder and implement debug in the original code
